scripts.build: npm --workspace @hollis/contracts run build && npm --workspace @hollis/design-tokens run build && npm --workspace @hollis/utils run build && npm --workspace @hollis/auth-client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @hollis/contracts run typecheck && npm --workspace @hollis/design-tokens run typecheck && npm --workspace @hollis/utils run typecheck && npm --workspace @hollis/auth-client run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run smoke:import
